news.headline: Air Europa flight incident injures dozens with four in ICU, fracturing necks and skulls. Plane makes emergency landing in Brazil.
news.summary: Four individuals were hospitalized in intensive care following an incident of severe turbulence on a flight from Spain to Uruguay that left dozens injured. The plane was forced to undergo an emergency landing in Brazil due to the turbulence.

news.headline: Bitfinex Pay rolls out version 0.7 with enhanced features, improvements, and fixes for the merchant crypto gateway dashboard.
news.summary: Bitfinex Pay has launched version 0.7, which introduces various enhancements and fixes to amplify the merchant crypto gateway dashboard. This update boasts new features and improvements aimed at refining the user experience and functionality.

news.headline: Trump aims to overturn hush-money conviction post SC immunity ruling.
news.summary: A recent report revealed staggering statistics about the global plastic pollution crisis. Approximately 8.3 billion metric tons of plastic have been produced since the 1950s, with an estimated 6.3 billion metric tons becoming waste. Shockingly, only 9% of all plastic waste has been recycled, while 12% has been incinerated. The remaining 79% accumulates in landfills or the natural environment, posing a severe threat to ecosystems and wildlife. Experts warn that if current trends continue, there could be 12 billion metric tons of plastic waste in landfills or the environment by 2050. Efforts to reduce plastic production and improve recycling rates are crucial to combat this escalating crisis.

news.headline: Fraud lawsuit against Roaring Kitty over GameStop dropped 3 days later. Complaint can be refiled in the future.
news.summary: An individual who invested in GameStop and accused Roaring Kitty of engaging in securities fraud has chosen to withdraw the complaint "without prejudice." This designation allows for the possibility of filing a similar lawsuit again in the future.

news.headline: Polkadot's treasury holds $245M with enough funds for 2 years. Blockchain revenues fell in H1 2024; ambassador wants lower token inflation rate.
news.summary: The blockchain experienced a decrease in revenue during the first half of 2024. The head ambassador of the platform has urged for a reduction in the inflation rate of its token.

Tesla bull Ross Gerber criticizes blaming crypto amid regulatory concerns. Citi noted as top bank for money launderers. #Bitcoin
news.summary: Ross Gerber, influential CEO of Gerber Kawasaki Wealth, recently voiced skepticism about the common trend of faulting cryptocurrencies amidst regulatory concerns. In a recent post on X (formerly Twitter), he highlighted his views on the ongoing debate regarding cryptocurrency regulation. Gerber's statement, "Funny how they always blame crypto for this when we all know the glaring truth," reflects his disbelief in the scapegoating of cryptocurrencies. His remarks were made on July 2, 2024. For further details, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Japan's long-term bonds face challenges despite decreasing supply. #Bloomberg #Japan #bonds
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the economy grew by 5.2% in the last quarter, exceeding expectations of a 4.8% increase. The unemployment rate has dropped to 3.7%, the lowest it has been in over a decade. Additionally, the stock market saw a record high, with the main index reaching 35,000 points for the first time. Experts suggest that these positive indicators signal strong economic growth and stability.

news.headline: Collaboration: Brev.dev now integrates with NVIDIA NGC Catalog for easy GPU deployment, boosting efficiency.
news.summary: Brev.dev and NVIDIA NGC Catalog have collaborated to streamline AI development by enabling one-click deployment of GPU-optimized software. This partnership aims to improve efficiency and save time by simplifying the setup process.

news.headline: Signet Therapeutics gains FDA approval for sigx1094 to treat Diffuse Gastric Cancer, first of its kind; Phase I trial next.
news.summary: A biotech company based in Boston, Signet Therapeutics, has received clearance from the FDA for its Investigational New Drug (IND) application for sigx1094. This drug is being developed as a treatment for diffuse gastric cancer (DGC) and is the first targeted drug candidate for this specific type of cancer. DGC currently lacks effective treatment options, making this development significant. Signet Therapeutics is now preparing to launch a Phase I clinical trial to evaluate the safety and efficacy of sigx1094. This step represents a crucial advancement in the fight against DGC, and it underscores the potential impact of using organoid disease models and artificial intelligence in developing personalized cancer therapies.

news.headline: Trump wants to overturn hush-money conviction post SC immunity ruling.
news.summary: A recent report indicates that the unemployment rate in the country has reached 7.4%, marking an increase of 1.2% compared to last year. The number of unemployed individuals is now at 1.8 million, with the largest impact seen in the retail and hospitality sectors. Additionally, the report highlighted a decrease in job vacancies by 15% from the previous quarter. Experts suggest that the rising unemployment rate is a result of the ongoing economic challenges due to the pandemic, and the country's slow recovery process. Efforts are being made to address this issue and boost employment opportunities in various industries.

news.headline: Trip.com Group partners with Prioticket to expand travel offerings in Europe, the Middle East, and US. Collaboration to enhance tours, activities, and experiences.
news.summary: In Shanghai on July 1, 2024, a major online travel agency, Trip.com Group, revealed their partnership with Prioticket, a top connectivity platform for organizing, selling, and dispersing tours, activities, and experiences. This collaboration will result in increased opportunities for growth and enhanced services in the travel sector, with Trip.com Group bringing their vast expertise and market reach, while Prioticket enhances their platform's accessibility and efficiency. The partnership marks an important milestone for both companies as they look forward to expanding their presence globally, with Trip.com Group garnering a large user base of over x million and Prioticket catering to a network of y partners. This strategic move is anticipated to bring significant benefits to customers seeking diverse and seamless travel experiences.

news.headline: HiRO, a global CRO, acquires DeltaMed Solutions in the US expansion, enhancing operations.
news.summary: In Wilmington, Delaware on July 1, 2024, Harvest Integrated Research Organization (HiRO), a specialized global CRO, has completed the acquisition of DeltaMed Solutions, a growing US-based CRO. This strategic business move marks a significant development for HiRO and strengthens its position in the market.

news.headline: BTC is expected to struggle with supply overhang in June 2024, affecting market performance as noted by Grayscale.
news.summary: In June 2024, Bitcoin (BTC) is expected to experience challenges due to supply overhang issues, impacting its market performance, as reported by Grayscale.

news.headline: Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Dogecoin stay steady on Mt. Gox anxiety with Bitcoin at $62,907.69, Ethereum at $3,441.69, Dogecoin at $0.1234. Market awaits Mt. Gox coin unloading for potential bullish sentiment flip.
news.summary: Leading cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin and Ethereum remained steady on Monday as investors awaited the impact of defunct exchange Mt. Gox unloading a large amount of coins onto the market. Bitcoin saw a slight increase of 0.46% reaching $62,907.69, hitting a peak at $63,000 but facing resistance afterwards. Ethereum also saw a modest 0.20% increase, reaching $3,441.69 before retreating back to the $3,400 region. However, Dogecoin saw a decrease of 0.96%, reaching $0.1234. Around $99.83 million in futures positions were wiped out in the last 24 hours, with both bullish and bearish bets being liquidated in equal numbers. Bitcoin's Open Interest dropped by 1.16% in the last 24 hours, which could indicate a potential trend reversal towards bullish sentiment. This has been coupled with an increase in bullish leveraged bets.

news.headline: MPCH collaborates with Canton Network to launch Global Synchronizer for secure blockchain interoperability. Leading tokenization for real-world assets.
news.summary: MPCH is playing a key role as a foundational infrastructure provider for the Canton Network's decentralized, interoperable backbone. The company is at the forefront of enabling the responsible tokenization and atomic exchange of regulated real-world assets. The announcement was made on July 1, 2024, in New York.

news.headline: Trip.com Group's childcare subsidy has benefited 540+ employees, along with family-friendly policies like hybrid work options and assisted reproduction benefits.
news.summary: Since its inception last year, over 540 employees across the globe have utilized the childcare subsidy at Trip.com Group. The company has introduced several family-friendly initiatives, such as hybrid work choices and assisted reproduction benefits. On July 1, 2024, in Shanghai, the organization celebrated the one-year anniversary of these progressive policies.

news.headline: COOFANDY showcased global vision at the 10th Bonjour Brand Forum 2024 in Paris, held at UNESCO HQ on June 1.
news.summary: In Paris on July 1, 2024, COOFANDY, a contemporary brand specializing in men's essentials, joined the Bonjour Brand Forum 2024. The event occurred at the United Nations Educational, Scientific and Cultural Organization (UNESCO) headquarters in June.

This gathering aimed to showcase the unique strengths and potential of these companies to the international community. The event brought together a total of four Nasdaq-listed Japanese companies. news.headline: LG Energy Solution to supply 39GWh of LFP batteries to Renault's Ampere for 5 years starting 2025, first large-scale deal for EVs.
news.summary: LG Energy Solution has secured a deal to provide Ampere with lithium iron phosphate (LFP) pouch-type batteries for a period of five years beginning in 2025. The agreement will involve the supply of approximately 39 gigawatt-hours (GWh) worth of batteries. This marks LG Energy Solution's initial major contract to supply LFP batteries specifically for electric vehicles (EVs), representing a significant expansion of their product offerings and entry into the entry-level vehicle segment.

news.headline: Global milled carbon fiber market to reach $302 million by 2029, growing at 10.8% CAGR. Key players include Toray Industries, Teijin Limited. Offering strength-to-weight ratio and diverse applications in automotive, electronics industries, the market benefits from technological advancements. Challenges include limited recycling facilities.
news.summary: The Milled Carbon Fiber Market is expected to grow from USD 182 million in 2024 to USD 302 million by 2029, at a CAGR of 10.8%. Milled carbon fiber, a short form of carbon fiber, is utilized as a reinforcing material in composite materials due to its exceptional properties. The global market's growth is driven by increasing demand in industries like automotive and electrical & electronics. The market is benefitting from technological advancements in manufacturing processes. Key players in the market include Toray Industries and Mitsubishi Chemical. Drivers include eco-friendly development, while challenges include limited recycling facilities. The recycled fiber type segment is expected to grow at the highest CAGR during the forecast period.

news.headline: Advanced MedTech reports record revenues for FY2024 and announces leadership transition with Abel Ang retiring as CEO. Yau Chung to take over as new CEO from October 1.
news.summary: On July 2, 2024, in Singapore, Advanced MedTech Holdings (AMTH), a global leader in urology, announced the retirement of Abel Ang as Group Chief Executive Officer (CEO) as part of a planned leadership transition. The Group Chief Operating Officer (COO), Wong Yau Chung, has been appointed as the Group CEO-designate starting July 1, 2024, and will officially take on the role of Group CEO on October 1, 2024. Yau Chung will also join the Board of Directors as the Group CEO, while Abel Ang will remain on the Board of Directors of AMTH.

news.headline: Greenspring Advisors to award $100,000 in grants through 2024 Greenspring Grant Program starting July 1st.
news.summary: In Towson, Maryland, on July 1, 2024, Greenspring Advisors revealed the launch of the 2024 Greenspring Grant Program. The program will accept applications starting on July 1st through to July 31st, 2024. Greenspring has a strong dedication to giving back, reflected in the program's initiative.

news.summary: In June, Bitfarms boosted its digital mining capacity to 10.4 exahashes every second, representing a substantial 39% growth from the previous month.

Chinese President Xi Jinping will attend SCO meeting in Astana and visit Kazakhstan and Tajikistan.
news.summary: On July 2, 2024, it has been reported that Chinese President Xi Jinping is scheduled to participate in the 24th Meeting of the Council of Heads of State of the Shanghai Cooperation Organization (SCO) in Astana from July 2 to 6. During this time, President Xi will also conduct state visits to Kazakhstan and Tajikistan.

news.headline: Altos Biologics filed MAA for aflibercept biosimilar ALT-L9 in South Korea, KOSDAQ listed Alteogen Inc. subsidiary.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, Alteogen Inc., listed on KOSDAQ as 196170, disclosed that its subsidiary Altos Biologics Inc. has filed a Marketing Authorization Application with the European Medicines Agency for an aflibercept biosimilar ALT-L9. This development marks a significant milestone for the company in seeking approval for the biosimilar product in the European market.

news.headline: WTW names James Baum as Head of Australia & New Zealand and Corporate Risk & Broking, to drive growth.
news.summary: James Baum has been named the Head of Australia and New Zealand, as well as the Head of Corporate Risk & Broking for the same regions. This appointment marks an important development in the company, with Baum taking on significant responsibilities for overseeing operations and risk management in Australia and New Zealand. The move reflects the company's focus on these regions and its commitment to effective leadership. A significant milestone for Baum, this new role will involve overseeing a diverse range of operations and a substantial workforce in Australia and New Zealand.

news.summary: Stock futures on the Dow Jones dropped as Tesla's stock saw significant growth on Monday in anticipation of the Q2 deliveries. On Tuesday, Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell is scheduled to deliver a speech. This data was reported in an article on Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: ProMach expands Zalkin facility in France, investing in European market. Leader in processing & packaging solutions.
news.summary: ProMach, a prominent global company specializing in processing and packaging solutions, has furthered its commitment to the European market through a recent expansion of Zalkin's manufacturing facility for capping and cap handling equipment. The investment was made in Cincinnati on July 1, 2024. This move signifies ProMach's dedication to enhancing its operations in Europe and ensuring top-notch manufacturing capabilities for its products.

news.headline: Hunterdon Tourism teams up with Chef Aaron McCargo Jr. for summer kick-off. "The Other Side of Jersey With Chef Aaron" showcases local businesses.
news.summary: Hunterdon County Economic Development has launched a new initiative, "The Other Side of Jersey With Celebrity Chef Aaron McCargo, Jr.," as part of their tourism campaign to promote local businesses and activities. The program aims to showcase the diverse offerings in the area and attract visitors. The event took place on June 1st, 2024, in Flemington, New Jersey. This initiative is a part of the county's broader efforts to boost tourism and highlight the region's attractions.

news.headline: Quadrant Capital in Center Valley, PA, enhances service with recent hires & promotions for strategic growth.
news.summary: Quadrant Capital, a wealth management firm based in Center Valley, Pennsylvania, has announced a series of new hires and promotions as part of their strategic growth plan. The team expansion includes a significant number of additions to support the company's initiatives. The promotions within the company indicate a commitment to internal development and career advancement. This move demonstrates Quadrant Capital's dedication to expanding their services and enhancing their expertise. The recent developments aim to strengthen their position in the market and provide clients with an improved level of service.

news.headline: CCA-led 4C launches new clean cooking carbon methodology. Public comment period until August 9, 2024. - Washington, July 1, 2024.
news.summary: The public is invited to submit comments on the new emissions reduction methodology for cooking projects developed by the Clean Cooking & Climate Consortium (4C), spearheaded by the Clean Cooking Alliance (CCA). The public comment period runs until August 9, 2024. This initiative marks a significant milestone as it is the first of its kind in the industry.

news.headline: Extend CentOS on Google Cloud with CIQ Bridge for up to 3 years after June 30, 2024 end of software updates.
news.summary: Starting from June 30, 2024, CentOS 7 will cease to receive software updates, marking its end of life status. To address this issue, users can now prolong the life of CentOS environments on Google Cloud by up to 3 years using CIQ Bridge. The announcement was made in Reno, Nevada on July 1, 2024.

news.headline: Podcast discusses AI's impact on customer service with expert Siddhartha Sharad. Touches on digital transformation and machine-led interactions.
news.summary: Tune in to the Disruption InterruptionTM podcast where host Karla Jo Helms engages in a conversation with Siddhartha Sharad, an expert in customer experience. They explore the profound effects of digital transformation and artificial intelligence (AI) on customer service. The discussion highlights the transition from traditional to tech-driven customer interactions, touching upon key insights and strategies. Don't miss out on this enlightening episode delving into the future of customer service in today’s evolving digital landscape.
